target.profile_basis: RCH ts2 fj-ad profile identified grad_sum_x2_plus_x_1k as the AD outlier; all other AD rows were <=2.041 us in the originating profile.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts2 RCH_WORKERS=ts2 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-nnf7f-baseline-rch-target rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-ad --bench ad_baseline -- ad/grad_sum_x2_plus_x_1k --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
